title: Member Gate
brief: Let a member enter a workspace with email and password or a supported external account.
audience: A returning member signing in to their workspace at the start of a session.
scope: A signed-in session persisted to the browser's localStorage, restored on reload, and cleared by Sign out
A 30-second lockout after 5 consecutive failed sign-in attempts
boundaries: No real authentication provider or backend session is connected
The signed-in session is saved to this browser's localStorage only, not to any server
No password recovery or account creation backend
External sign-in reports its boundary instead of navigating
